chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No. 798 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of Bail Application 17.05.2023 Mr. Asghar Ali Khan Advocate along with Applicant Bakhat Roz Khan Mr. Talib Ali Memon, Assistant Prosecutor General Sher Khitab, Complainant in person.-.-.-. Three persons i.e. Sher Khitab, his son Bilal and another little boy Noman were injured in a shooting incident attributed to the applicant. Sher Khitab and Bilal are present in person and confirm that all three injured have forgiven the applicant. I notice that Nauman however was not present. Upon query Sher Khitab confirmed that Nauman is a 12 year old boy who is like his son and that he is now in good health and that he too had forgiven the applicant. There appears no reason for Sher Khitab to lie. Counsel for the applicant submits that the necessary applications under section 345 Cr.P.C. will be filed shortly in the learned trial court. Learned APG after listening to what the complainant had to say renders his no objection if the pre-arrest bail is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. Order accordingly. JUDGE
